commands.payload:
Pathfinder 0.4.2+3a52a5d1a9a1a26ef27a3f9efc5574dfb12ec233
Copyright (C) 2026 Maksymilian Mozolewski

  analyze    Analyze DLLs for routing information and output JSON or text

  report     Analyze and also produce a report

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

result.stdout:
Pathfinder 0.4.2+3a52a5d1a9a1a26ef27a3f9efc5574dfb12ec233
Copyright (C) 2026 Maksymilian Mozolewski

  -d <directory>, --dll-dir=<directory>       (Default: .) Root directory to
                                              search for DLLs

  -c <config file>, --config=<config file>    (Default: pathfinder.json) Path to
                                              config file. Should be able to
                                              find it automatically.

  -f <JSON|Text>, --format=<JSON|Text>        (Default: JSON) Output format

  --help                                      Display this help screen.

  --version                                   Display version information.

  DLLGlobs (pos. 0)                           Required. Glob patterns for DLLs
                                              to analyze (e.g. *.dll or
                                              **/*.dll)

staticCommands.description: Analyze DLLs for routing information and output JSON or text

values.name: DLLGlobs
values.description: Glob patterns for DLLs to analyze (e.g. *.dll or **/*.dll)
